units.name: Master Chief
units.description: The legendary Spartan-II super-soldier. Master Chief Petty Officer John-117.

units.name: Spartan MK VII
units.description: Versatile Spartan-IV in Mjolnir MK VII armor. Standard multi-role configuration.

units.name: Spartan Zvezda
units.description: Medium-range specialist Spartan-IV. Excels at sustained fire at mid-range engagements.

units.name: Spartan Deadeye
units.description: Long-range Spartan-IV marksman. Optimized for precision fire from distance.

units.name: Spartan Brawler
units.description: Close-range Spartan-IV specialist. Built for aggressive assaults and tight-quarters fighting.

options.name: Needler
options.description: Crystal shards track and supercombine on targets.

units.name: Spartan CQB
units.description: Close-quarters battle Spartan-IV. Deadly in melee, equipped with battlefield-recovered Covenant blades.

units.name: Spartan HAZOP
units.description: Hazardous Operations Spartan-IV. Suited for toxic and extreme environment combat.

units.name: Spartan Gungnir
units.description: Heavy weapons Spartan-IV. Specializes in explosive and energy-based ordnance.

units.name: Sangheili Mercenary
units.description: Elite Sangheili warrior fighting for profit. Can be recruited by either UNSC or Banished fireteams.

options.name: Needler
options.description: Crystal shards track and supercombine on targets.

options.name: Energy Sword
options.description: Covenant plasma blade — devastating in close combat.

options.name: Energy Dagger
options.description: Short-range plasma blade for initial close combat.

units.name: Spartan JFO
units.description: Joint Fires Observer Spartan-IV. Battlefield coordinator and fire support specialist.

options.name: Target Locator
options.description: Calls in orbital strike on marked targets.

units.name: Atriox
units.description: Legendary Jiralhanae warlord who defied the Covenant and built the Banished from their survivors. Wields Chainbreaker.

units.name: Sangheili Mercenary
units.description: Elite Sangheili warrior fighting for profit. Can be recruited by either UNSC or Banished fireteams.

options.name: Needler
options.description: Crystal shards track and supercombine on targets.

options.name: Energy Sword
options.description: Covenant plasma blade — devastating in close combat.

options.name: Energy Dagger
options.description: Short-range plasma blade for initial close combat.

units.name: Jiralhanae Berserker
units.description: Frenzied Jiralhanae warrior who fights with unrestrained ferocity. Armed with wrist blades.

units.name: Jiralhanae Captain
units.description: Banished squad leader. Carries heavy weaponry and Jiralhanae power gauntlets for close combat.

units.name: Jiralhanae Warrior
units.description: Standard Banished Jiralhanae trooper. Armed with a scavenged VK78 Commando, spike grenade, and fists.

units.name: Jiralhanae Sniper
units.description: Long-range Jiralhanae marksman. Capable of eliminating targets at extreme distances.

options.name: Shock Rifle + Disruptor + Fists
options.description: Shock damage disrupts electronics and chaining bolts.

units.name: Jiralhanae Chosen Warrior
units.description: Elite Jiralhanae warrior selected for honor and strength. Armed with Sentinel Beam, spike grenade, and fists.

commandUpgrades.name: Extra Command Die
commandUpgrades.detail: Gain an extra Command Die every round.

commandUpgrades.name: Extra Command Die (Single Use)
commandUpgrades.detail: Once per game: gain an extra Command Die for one round. Declare before rolling.

commandUpgrades.name: Extra d8 (Single Use)
commandUpgrades.detail: Once per game: roll an extra d8 alongside a Symbol command die result.

commandUpgrades.name: Extra Recon Roll
commandUpgrades.detail: Gain an extra roll on the Recon table (Winner or Loser table, as appropriate).
